title: Bonney Sees Kuma’s Memories
description: On pages 11–13, this part focuses on Unknown person #10, Ivankov, Saturn, Unknown person #11, Bonney, Unknown person #12 as Bonney discovers Kuma’s memories, revealing his Buccaneer heritage, Ginny, the Revolutionary Army, God Valley, and the painful origins behind Kuma’s sacrifice.
scene: Bonney discovers Kuma’s memories, revealing his Buccaneer heritage, Ginny, the Revolutionary Army, God Valley, and the painful origins behind Kuma’s sacrifice.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: IVA and inazuma got caught and sent to prison.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And how are you holding up? I hear you've been wearing a lot of hats recently... *King," *tyrant," and *pirate!"

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: people change.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Oh please! Like anyone in the revolutionary army would take those articles seriously!:)

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: By the way, Kuma... how would you feel if I became the captain of the eastern forces?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Why are you asking me?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Another sharp-tongued woman heading up the eastern forces...? That's fine by me.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Dragon-san won't let anyone officially take up Ginny-samas old post without your blessing!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: ALL RIGHT!!()

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Sabo and Koala wanted to see you too!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Our young revolutionaries are steadily becoming stronger, I'd love you to see how far they've come.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: As I traveled the world, I often found myself wondering, "What would dragon do here?"

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Honestly, I'd like to return to the revolutionaries too, but...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...that reminds me, I wanted to talk to you about Bonney.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Have you heard of a navy scientist by the name of Dr. vegapunk?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There was an accident the other day, and he's going to have to switch labs.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's usually tricky to get a hold of a man like him...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ....but I'm sure security will be pretty lax around him at the moment.

dialogue.speaker: Ivankov
dialogue.text: Thank you for the lead, Dragon!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: To be honest, I was close to giving up....!! I'll try not to be a stranger!!

dialogue.speaker: Saturn
dialogue.text: If I can cure Bonney's Disease...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...I'll be ready to fight by your side once more!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Go where the winds of fate take you...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: ...my friend.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Hyah!!

dialogue.speaker: Saturn
dialogue.text: Wow, Bonney, you're amazing!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: I went easy on her, KOFF!!

dialogue.speaker: Bonney
dialogue.text: Daddy!! (7

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Lab 08 (future location of egghead)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Where are we going?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: I'm taking you for a checkup.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This doctor is just gonna take a look before you're cured!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: GADZOOKS!! People really do come in all shapes and sizes. Don't they?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Funny, looking at you, I was thinking the exact same thing.....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Holy cow... what a huge head!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Kinda creepy.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Your physique is extraordinary!! Please, you must let me study your muscles...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: For the sake of scientific progress!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Oh? Is she the sick child you mentioned?...she looks like a cheeky scamp.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Well, a little pluckiness never hurt anyone.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Sapphire scales, eh... you've done well to contain the spread.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: I can cure her.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: You can?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'll do it with a method that's never been used in the medical field till now!!

summary: This part advances the Kuma and Bonney’s Tragedy through 44 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
